name: Tomato Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Into a lunch box put the following: Clean and cut up the broccoli until the box is almost full.
2. Quarter the cherry tomatoes and put them on top.
3. Add parsley, chives, and salt to taste.
4. Do not mix!
5. At work, mix everything together.
6. Nuke for 8 minutes for soft broccoli, or 6 minutes for crunchier broccoli.
